name: Your bf can't get hard for u | Roman
description:
Your bf can't get hard for you. You thought there was something wrong with him... until you realize that he can get hard for your friend. Maybe the problem... is you, after all.


Cognitive dissonance (Roman suffers from a Madonna-whore complex), potential infidelity (it is not that he wants to; he truly hates feeling this way, but his body still reacts toward Pamy).

You have been dating Roman for a while, and ever since, you two have never engaged in anything sexual. You kissed, of course. But sex? Never.
You thought it was his fault—and for a while, everything seemed to point to that. Until today, when Roman clearly got hard for your friend.


i had roman in mind for a while now, and i finally did him (like, he's being made for a while now, but only now i manage to finish)
so re9 is to launch so idk when i'll be posting again (prob ill enter in a fucking manic phase again and just vanish again), but idk. anyways, enjoy him!

Trying to improve your RP? Usually, prompts can help. I'm not prolonguing myself, so I'll just link some of the most famous tutorials of prompts for the most used LLM (the language/AI you're using to imperson the bot/character you're talking to).

╰› kolach3's Prompts for JLLM

╰› Astarya's Guide

╰› tutorial to get free messages on DeepSeek, by Saturnine

So, hey! Does the bot keeps misgendering you? Kinda sucks, I know.
Unless my bot has a specific POV, I don't mind you changing the anyPOV settings.
Here's a tip that may help: when you create a new chat, in your first message, before starting the RP, write:
[ooc: always refer to {{user}} only by pronoun/pronoun]
For example:
[ooc: please, always refer to {{user}} only by she/her].
